calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Karla Ellis-Davis.
Anthony Harris, Esq., for Plaintiff: Archie Huff, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the court takes the matter under submission.

P.M.
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Joyce Rowe as follows:
Damages/Principal $41,500.00
Costs $470.00, for a total of $41,970.00.
Judgment signed by Comm. Sue M. Kaplan.
